data.title: CBDCs close Orwell’s ’1984 loop perfectly,’ think tank says
data.description:
CBDCs threaten more central bank control over money, including potential expiry dates on personal savings, Bitcoin Policy UK’s CEO said.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cbdcs-programmable-money-orwellian-1984-loop?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Global CBDC Developments Highlight Transatlantic Divide in Financial Technology
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the global push for central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) is raising concerns about increased control over the money supply and personal savings by financial institutions. This development is accentuating the divide between the United States and Europe in terms of financial technology. CBDCs are digital representations of fiat currency issued on a permissioned, private blockchain, typically managed by a central bank, contrasting with decentralized blockchain networks.

Susie Violet Ward, a financial analyst and CEO of Bitcoin Policy UK, cautioned that CBDCs could represent the "weaponization of money in its purest form." During Cointelegraph’s Chain Reaction daily X spaces show, Ward expressed concerns that this programmable form of money could lead to heightened central bank control over individual spending, potentially including an "expiry date" on personal savings. She remarked, "They'll be able to control everything you do through money," drawing parallels to George Orwell’s dystopian novel, 1984, which depicts a world dominated by an oppressive central government.

The transatlantic divide is becoming more pronounced as Europe advances with its digital euro initiatives, while the United States focuses on stablecoin innovation and has banned the creation of CBDCs. Recently, the U.S. House of Representatives included a provision in a defense policy bill for the 2026 fiscal year that prohibits the Federal Reserve from issuing a CBDC. This provision aims to prevent the Fed from offering digital currencies or financial services directly to individuals. A similar bill, the Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, passed in July with a narrow majority and is awaiting a Senate vote.

U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order on January 23, 2025, banning the establishment, issuance, circulation, or use of CBDCs, citing concerns over their potential impact on financial system stability, individual privacy, and national sovereignty. Meanwhile, the European Union is moving forward with its digital euro plans, reportedly considering major public blockchains like Ethereum for its CBDC, rather than a private blockchain, to ensure data accessibility to authorized entities.

European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde announced that the digital euro is expected to launch in October 2025, emphasizing that it will coexist with cash and include privacy protections to mitigate concerns about government overreach. While CBDCs are lauded for their potential to enhance financial inclusion, critics have voiced apprehensions regarding their surveillance capabilities. In Brazil, the central bank's CBDC pilot revealed embedded surveillance and control mechanisms, allowing the bank to freeze or reduce user funds within CBDC wallets.

data.title: Vanilla Drainer Scam Service Steals Millions in Cryptocurrency
data.description:
According to PANews, blockchain investigation firm Darkbit has uncovered a new scam service called Vanilla Drainer, which has stolen at least $5.27 million in cryptocurrency over three weeks. The organization assists fraudsters by providing phishing software and takes a 15%-20% commission from the stolen funds.

Vanilla Drainer has been active since October 2024, promoting its ability to bypass security detection platforms like Blockaid. On August 5, the largest single theft involved a loss of $3.09 million in stablecoins, with the operator profiting $463,000. The stolen funds are typically converted into ETH or non-freezable stablecoin DAI and eventually consolidated into a specific wallet, which currently holds tokens valued at $2.23 million.

To evade detection, Vanilla Drainer creates new contracts for each malicious website and frequently changes domain names.

data.title: Boxabl Expands Bitcoin Holdings as Part of Financial Strategy
data.description: According to PANews, Las Vegas-based construction technology company Boxabl has announced the acquisition of an additional 10 bitcoins as part of its established financial reserve strategy. Boxabl first adopted the Bitcoin treasury reserve approach in May 2025, allowing the company to hold a portion of its assets in Bitcoin to hedge against inflation, diversify its investment portfolio, and maintain long-term value.

data.title: Significant Outflow in Crypto Investment Products as ETP Trading Volume Surges
data.description: According to Foresight News, CoinShares has released its latest weekly report indicating a substantial outflow of $1.43 billion from digital asset investment products, marking the largest withdrawal since March. Concurrently, the trading volume for Exchange-Traded Products (ETPs) has soared to $38 billion.

data.title: Mega Matrix Inc. Announces Strategic Reserve for Stablecoin Governance
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mega Matrix Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker MPU, has announced the establishment of a treasury reserve strategy for stablecoin governance tokens. The company plans to use Ethena's ecosystem governance token, $ENA, as a core strategic reserve asset. This initiative aims to actively participate in the governance of the stablecoin ecosystem by strategically holding leading stablecoin governance tokens, positioning the company at the forefront of stablecoin innovation.

data.title: Safety Shot, Inc. Secures $30 Million in Strategic Funding
data.description: According to Foresight News, Safety Shot, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHOT) has announced the successful pricing of a $30 million financing round. The funding is led by a consortium of strategic investors, including FalconX. The transaction involves a registered direct offering of approximately $5 million in cash and a simultaneous private placement of $25 million paid in BONK tokens by founding members of BONK. All shares are priced at $0.46 each. The registered direct offering and the concurrent private placement are expected to close around August 27, 2025, subject to customary closing conditions.
